_comment: Saved parity exceptions: diffs a human reviewed and labelled 'migrated is correct / intended improvement'. The runner treats a result row whose aspect contains one of acceptedAspects as ACCEPTED (passes, writes no finding). Keyed by case id.

TC-PRICE-000.note: Org Pricing grid columns are an intentional migrated redesign (pricing-centric: Organization/Plan/Product/Grand Total/From/To/Txn ID/Status). Migrated is the source of truth for this grid; legacy's contact/audit columns are deliberately not carried over.

TC-USER-000.note: Users grid adds Department + Designation columns vs legacy — accepted as a useful enhancement (F-0012). Migrated is the source of truth for this grid's columns.

TC-MSEG-000.note: Market Segment grid header reads 'Regional Name' (the entity name) vs legacy 'Segment Name' — accepted as-is (F-0014). Migrated is the source of truth for this grid's columns.

TC-ADDR-000.note: Addresses grid adds Updated Date + Status columns vs legacy — accepted as a useful enhancement (F-0015). Migrated is the source of truth for this grid's columns.

TC-GEN-DL-000.note: Transaction Date Lock grid header reads 'Entity Alias' vs legacy 'Entity' — accepted (F-0020); 'Entity Alias' is the intended migrated label.

TC-GEN-FY-000.note: Financial Year grid uses 'Entity Alias' (vs legacy 'Entity') and adds a Status column — accepted (F-0021) as the intended migrated labels/enhancement.
